Frequently asked questions (FAQ's)

Here's some of the questions we're asked the most...
What ages do you cater for?

We welcome children aged 4-14 years old. Our programs are designed with age-appropriate activities and we group children by age to ensure everyone has the best possible experience.

What should my child bring to camp?

Please ensure your child brings snacks and a bottle of drinking water, even though water fountains are available on site.

Camp uniform consists of black bottoms, comfortable trainers for running around, and a Jump Starters camp T-shirt, which is mandatory.

All other equipment needed for the day will be provided by us.

Refer to Parents' Handbook For Full Details
How do you ensure my child's safety?

Safety is our top priority. All staff are DBS checked, first aid trained, and safeguarding certified. We maintain low staff-to-child ratios, conduct regular safety briefings, and have comprehensive risk assessments for all activities.

What happens if the weather is bad?

We have extensive indoor facilities and covered areas, so camp runs in all weather conditions. We adapt activities based on weather but always ensure children have a full, fun day regardless of conditions.

Can I book individual days or do I need to book a full week?

You can book individual days or full weeks - whatever works best for your family. We offer flexible booking options including half-day sessions for younger children, and sibling discounts.

Full Pricing & Booking Details Here
Do you provide food?

We provide hot meals during our HAF camps, which run during the Summer, Easter, and Christmas holidays. For all other camps, children will need to bring a packed lunch. There are also three breaks throughout the day, so we recommend that children bring snacks to enjoy during those times.

What if my child has special needs?

We welcome children with additional needs and work closely with parents to ensure every child can participate fully. Please discuss your child's needs when booking so we can make appropriate arrangements.

Still have questions? We're here to help!

Tel: 07525495181

or

Drop Us An Email: admin@jumpstarterstc.co.uk
